Guess what? Comic Fiesta is almost here! Mark your calendars for December 20th and 21st because JCS will once again be offering a shuttle bus from MMU to the KL Convention Centre! 🚌💨

If you’re new to the event, Comic Fiesta is one of the largest and longest-running anime conventions in Southeast Asia. Expect to see talented artists, illustrators, cosplayers, and countless fans celebrating their love for pop culture! ✨

Transportation details:
📆 Date: 20 & 21 December
🕘 Pickup Time : 9.00 AM (Gather at 8.30 AM)
🏢 Gather at STAD Building!
🏠 Return time: 8.30 PM

Seats are limited so don't miss out the fun event.

The Guild's Masquerade 2026 🎭👥

✉️ You are invited to our annual costume party!

Play games with your friends and family with our available board games, dress up in your sunday best and join us for dinner.

📅 Date : 7th November 2026, Saturday
🕛 Time : 3pm - 11:30pm
📍 Location : Multipurpose Hall, MMU Cyberjaya
💵 Registration Fee : RM 20 (Meal included)

❗ Purchase your ticket via the QR code to secure a meal.

※ No meals will be provided for walk-ins.

#malaysiaevents #costumeparty #multimediauniversity #boardgames #klevents
alt: Poster for “The Guild’s Masquerade,” a board game and costume party event in Cyberjaya, Malaysia. The event takes place on 7 November 2026 from 3:00 PM to 11:30 PM at Multipurpose Hall, MMU Cyberjaya. Hosted by DICE, it features boardgames, a potluck meal, and a fantasy-themed masquerade night with mystery and magic. Registration fee is RM20 with a meal included, and a QR code is shown for sign-up. Walk-ins available but without a meal.

Ready for something new, fresh, and easy to remember?! Say hello to ✨ YO-i ✨, the easy-to-remember event name for Yoakezuki 2025!

We're bringing you two full days of non-stop Japanese Culture and ACG excitement, and you're all invited! Yes, that means FREE ENTRY! 🥳

📍 Location: Spectrum Mall, Ampang
🗓️ Date: 20 & 21 September 2025
⏰ Time: 10 AM - 7 PM
🎟️FREE ENTRY

WHAT’S GOING DOWN?
🏆 COSPLAY Competition (16+)
🎨 Kids Colouring Contest (12 & below)
💥 Kamen Rider Henshin Challenge
🎬 Private Cinema Screening
✍️ Animation Studio Sharing
🦸 Superhero & Guest Meet & Greets
🛍️ Artist & Merch Booths
🎏 Workshops & Japanese Games
...and SO much more!

Huge thanks to Spectrum Mall, Ampang & our amazing collaborators for their incredible support! 🙏

Tag your event squad and get ready! MORE INFO COMING SOON! 🔥

#Yoi2025 #Yoakezuki2025 #ACGEvent #JapaneseCulture #EventKL #SpectrumMallAmpang #FreeEvent #CosplayMalaysia #AnimeMalaysia #KamenRider

caption:
🌸 🌸 こんにちは、みんな!!! 🌸 🌸

Guess what? Movie Night is back! And it's going to be fun! So gather your friends, grab some popcorn and let's chill together to watch some Japanese movies! 🎥🍿

Details:

🗓 Date: 10/9/2025
🕗 Time : 8.00 - 11.00 PM
🌃 Venue: CNMX 1005
Movies: 
1. Howl's Moving Castle
2. Violet Evergarden the Movie

🌸 🌸 Hope to see y'all there soon! 🌸 🌸

✨ WIN A NEW PHONE AT YO-I 2025! ✨

That’s right! We’re giving away a shiny new Redmi phone to TWO lucky winner EACH DAY ! 📱🥳

HOW TO ENTER:

1. COME to YO-i (Yoakezuki 2025) at Spectrum Mall on Sept 20-21.

2. START The Moon Quest 🌙🌕 at our registration counter.

3. COMPLETE all the fun tasks around the event.

4. SUBMIT your completed quest form to enter the giveaway!

It's that simple! Join us for a weekend of Japanese culture, awesome activities, and your chance to go home with a fantastic prize.

Save this post so you don't forget! See you this weekend!

STAY TUNED FOR MORE DETAILS GUIDE LINE nearer to the event day💡🔥 

#YOi2025 #Giveaway #ContestAlert #MalaysiaGiveaway #RedmiMalaysia #SpectrumMallAmpang #FreeStuff #KLEvent #Selangor #themoonquest

caption:
Hey Creators! 📣 Time is running out!

We're on the final countdown for vendor registration for YO-i (Yoakezuki 2025) and we want YOU to be there! 🤩 All public vendors are welcomed 😆

Imagine a whole weekend surrounded by awesome art, passionate fans, and an amazing community vibe. That's what we're building, and there are only a handful of spots left!

🔥 EVENT DETAILS 🔥
▪️ Event: YO-i (Yoakezuki 2025)
▪️ Date: 20-21 September 2025
▪️ Time: 10 AM - 7 PM
▪️ Venue: Spectrum Mall, Ampang
▪️ Entry: FREE for all visitors!

👇 SECURE YOUR BOOTH NOW! 👇

🎨VENDOR BOOTH: RM280
(Includes 1 table, 2 chairs + RM50 refundable deposit)

🌟 EXHIBITOR BOOTH: RM350
(Includes 2 tables, 4 chairs + RM50 refundable deposit)

This is your last chance to get in on the action! DM us to book your spot or find the registration link via QR code. Let's go! 💖

#Yoi2025 #Yoakezuki2025 #ArtistCallout #MalaysiaEvents #DoujinMY #KomikMalaysia #SupportLocalMY #ArtBooth #Ampang #EventVendor #lastchance

Exciting news from the Japanese Cultural Society (JCS)! We’re thrilled to announce that we’re giving away Buddy Passes to the first 50 members who join us at NoizuCon! This is a first-come, first-served opportunity, so don’t miss your chance to bring a friend and enjoy all the fun together! 🎉

Here’s the link for the Buddy Pass: https://forms.gle/GZqyMzBXtkH1cEC77

Make sure to sign up early and grab your Buddy Pass! We can't wait to share this fantastic experience with you and your friends. 😊

こんにちは、みんな！

We are thrilled to announce that the Japanese Cultural Society (JCS) Club will be setting up an exciting booth at NoizuCon! Join us from September 13-15, 2024, at Dewan Tun Canselor for an unforgettable journey into Japanese culture! 🇯🇵✨

✨ What's in store for you? ✨

- Self-craft Workshops: Get creative and make your own Japanese crafts! 🎨
- Interactive Decorations: Immerse yourself in vibrant Japanese decor! 🎋
- Authentic Japanese Stalls: Savor delicious Japanese snacks and treats! 🍡
- Yukata Rental: Experience the elegance of wearing a traditional Yukata! 👘

Don't miss out on this amazing opportunity to explore and celebrate the rich heritage of Japan! We can't wait to see you all there! 😊

We would like to happily announce that JCS will be holding *Sakura Fest* on the *2nd of May, 2024*! ⸜(｡˃ ᵕ ˂ )⸝

‪🌸 There will be various kinds of attractions for you to enjoy, such as...
❥ 🎶 Live music! 🎶
• 🀄 Traditional Japanese games! 🀄
❥ 💃🏼 Dancing performances! 🕺🏼
• 👨🏼‍🎨 Art booths! 👩🏼‍🎨
❥ 🍰 ...and lastly, a maid café! 🍨✨

🌸 An art competition will also be held, so if you've got the talent to create some stunning illustrations, we encourage you to join it!

🌸 For those who are interested in setting up their own art booth for this festival, we have provided a link down below.

👇🏻 Click here to register! 👇🏻
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1AYR4T3xeYZWEV02ZpQ3r3EppwqJ6fVXAd9FTCLCYo0U/edit (Artist Booth) Link at bio

⚠️ Do remember that while cosplaying is allowed for Sakura Fest, please be sure to *adhere to MMU's dress code* at all times.

We hope to see all of you there!

AGM Throwback Part 1

🌸✨Throwing it back to the enchanting night of November 29, 2023 our Japanese Club Society's Annual Grand Meeting, it was a night of cultural celebration and shared dreams. From spirited cheers to appointing esteemed High Comms for the Term 23/24, each moment painted a vivid picture of unity. ありがとう to all who joined us! Let's cherish the bonds and promises made, celebrating the AGM that set the stage for a year of camaraderie and cultural brilliance. 🌸✨

📣 Attention Cosplayers of the Japanese Cultural Society~!

👘 We've just released new cosplay guidelines to enhance our cultural events. Please take note of the following rules: 

1️⃣ No NSFW/Revealing/Suggestive Clothing
• Choose characters and costumes that prioritize modesty, aligning with MMU attire guidelines. 

2️⃣ Respectful Costumes
• Ensure your costumes show respect and consideration for cultural sensitivities. 

3️⃣ No Political Costume
• Maintain a neutral and inclusive environment by avoiding overtly political themes. 

4️⃣ Only Cosplay During Japanese Cultural Society Event
• Cosplay is permitted EXCLUSIVELY during Japanese Cultural Society events. 

🎎 Please note that these rules MUST be followed in MMU's campus grounds, but are not applicable for events outside of MMU such as Comic Fiesta, Cos-Mic, and AniManGaki. Though, you will be responsible for your own actions! 

🌸 Let's make our cosplay experiences enjoyable, respectful, and in line with our cultural appreciation. Thank you for your cooperation~!
